vector_rows.question: What subsidiaries does JPMorgan Chase & Co. disclose?
vector_rows.answer:
JPMorgan Chase & Co. discloses the following subsidiaries:

1. JPMorgan Chase Bank, National Association (JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.) - principal bank subsidiary.
2. J.P. Morgan Securities LLC - principal non-bank subsidiary.
3. J.P. Morgan Securities plc - operating subsidiary in the U.K.
4. J.P. Morgan SE (JPMSE) - operating subsidiary in Germany.

These subsidiaries operate nationally as well as through overseas branches and representative offices [0001628280-26-008131].
